strategic_capability_mapping.relationship: Turns approved structured subtask.spawn input into concrete child TaskRecord goal and mode state instead of adding another parent-run blocked wrapper.
Lets explicitly run child tasks start with caller-requested bounded goals and existing mode policies.
Allows headless callers to request inspectable child task intent without persisting raw tool input bodies.

questions.prompt: Does subtask.spawn define and enforce a bounded structured input schema?
Does a valid requested child goal materialize onto the child TaskRecord?
Does a valid requested mode_id materialize onto the child TaskRecord?
Are unsafe or unresolved requested modes rejected before child materialization?
Does this phase avoid scheduler auto-dispatch, external workers, process exec expansion, network bypass, service control, patch apply, and workspace mutation paths?

answers.bounded_input_schema: Yes. subtask.spawn accepts only optional string goal and mode_id fields, rejects unknown fields, rejects empty/non-string/oversized values, and preserves no-input behavior.
answers.requested_goal_materialized: Yes. A valid requested goal is normalized into requested_goal_preview and becomes the child TaskRecord goal.
answers.requested_mode_materialized: Yes. A valid requested_mode_id is resolved against the workspace mode policy set and becomes the child TaskRecord mode_id.
answers.invalid_mode_rejected: Yes. Unsafe mode_id syntax is rejected by the parser, and unknown mode_id values append ToolIntentDenied without queuing or materializing a child.
answers.safety_boundary: Yes. The phase adds no scheduler auto-dispatch, external worker, patch apply, direct workspace mutation path, service control, network bypass, or process execution expansion.

exit_criteria: subtask.spawn has a bounded subtask.spawn input schema with optional goal and mode_id fields.
Child source_intent_summary exposes requested_goal_preview without raw input objects.
Child source_intent_summary exposes requested_mode_id without raw input objects.
A valid requested_goal_preview becomes the child TaskRecord goal.
A valid requested_mode_id becomes the child TaskRecord mode_id.
An unknown mode_id is denied before SubtaskOrchestrationQueued and child materialization.
Parent task.run does not auto-run child tasks.

No scheduler handoff, external worker, process exec expansion, network bypass, service control, patch apply, direct workspace mutation path, diagnostics wrapper RPC, or new blocked summary wrapper is added.
